readiness_policy.summary: Proceed with workflow, but track follow-up items from readiness notes.

operator_actions.primary: Proceed with workflow, but track follow-up items from readiness notes.
operator_actions.notes: Follow-up actions are mandatory before next phase gate.

remediation_triggers.actions: Resolve noted drift/issues in the next maintenance window.

escalation_rules.policy: Escalate if noted items increase or become blocking.
